mapper.select: with v_year_month_summary as ( select to_char(start_time, 'YYYY-MM') as year_month, dish_id, name, price, quantity from v_paid_order ) select distinct year_month, sum(quantity * price) over(partition by year_month) as total_revenue, name as dish_name, sum(quantity) over(partition by year_month, dish_id) as dish_quantity, sum(quantity * price) over(partition by year_month, dish_id) as dish_amount from v_year_month_summary where year_month between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} order by year_month desc, name
